since_last: 41% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.92%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.53% · BTC -2.09% · Gold -1.99% · Nasdaq100 -1.51%. 41% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.92%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.92%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +12.76%, INTU +6.83%, WDAY +5.37%, CRM +5.28%, SNOW +4.49%. Laggards: APP -11.30%, ARM -7.21%, MRVL -6.63%, OKLO -5.86%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.96% at $139.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
